name: ClawProBench
description: ClawProBench is a live-first benchmark harness for evaluating LLM agents   in the OpenClaw runtime with deterministic grading and repeated-trial   reliability.
summaryZh: ClawProBench is a live-first benchmark harness for evaluating LLM agents   in the OpenClaw runtime with deterministic grading and repeated-trial   reliability. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合做推理服务、模型部署、性能优化的工程团队。
